# Q6 join + if (crown-jewel flag) (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q6 join + if (crown-jewel flag). `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | join type = inner (dataset = gx_06_hosts) as h h.host = dst_host | alter is_crown = if(tier = "crown-jewel", "YES", "NO") | fields user, dst_host, tier, is_crown | sort desc is_crown, asc user
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
